title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
